name: landing-saas
prompt: A modern landing page for 'Cadence', a SaaS that turns meeting notes into action items. Hero with headline + clear CTA, a 3-feature row with icons, a logo cloud, a testimonials section, and a footer. Real Unsplash imagery, tasteful, no purple gradients.

name: dashboard-multichart
prompt: An analytics dashboard for an e-commerce store. A top KPI row (revenue, orders, AOV, conversion), then FOUR Chart.js charts: a line chart of revenue over 12 months, a bar chart of sales by category, a doughnut of traffic sources, and a horizontal bar of top products. A left sidebar nav. Every chart must actually render with real sample data.

name: threejs-product
prompt: A product showcase for a designer desk lamp that displays a rotating 3D model using three.js (a credible lamp from primitives — base, arm, shade — with lighting and OrbitControls). Hero copy beside the 3D canvas, a specs section below. The 3D scene must actually render, not a blank canvas.

name: dataviz-report
prompt: A single-page data report titled 'State of Remote Work 2026': an intro, then several Chart.js visualizations (a stacked bar, a line chart, a radar chart, and a pie), each with a short caption. Clean editorial layout, real plausible numbers, all charts must render.

name: portfolio-gallery
prompt: A photographer's portfolio: a full-bleed hero, a short About blurb, and a responsive masonry-style gallery of at least 9 real Unsplash photos, plus a contact footer. Images must actually load; elegant and minimal.

name: pricing-toggle
prompt: A pricing page with a working monthly/annual billing toggle (JS that updates the displayed prices), three tiers with feature lists and a highlighted 'most popular' plan, an FAQ accordion below, and a CTA. Tasteful, no purple gradients.

name: game-breakout
prompt: A playable browser Breakout game on an HTML5 canvas: paddle controlled by mouse and arrow keys, a ball, a grid of colored bricks, a live score, and a Start button. A title and brief instructions above the canvas. The brick grid must be visible on load.
